top_10.rationale: Official Python 3 documentation on the asyncio event loop — canonical primary source, covers event loop API, scheduling, lifecycle, and async task execution.
Real Python hands-on asyncio walkthrough — most comprehensive practical tutorial covering coroutines, event loop, tasks, futures, and concurrency patterns.
Educative: Python concurrency with asyncio — explains the event loop model (single-threaded, cooperative), async/await syntax, comparison to threads, and concurrency primitives.
Asyncio architecture: event loops, tasks, and futures explained — systematic breakdown of the three core components with I/O-bound vs. CPU-bound comparison.
Python Event Loop tutorial — directly explains how asyncio uses the event loop for single-threaded concurrency, with clear illustrations of the execution model.
AOSA 500 Lines: web crawler with asyncio coroutines — builds asyncio from first principles (polling loop through coroutines), foundational for deep understanding of the event loop.
Advanced Python concurrency guide — covers event loop optimization, custom event loop management, combining asyncio with thread/process pools for mixed workloads.
Super Fast Python: asyncio event loop in separate thread — practical guide covering the pattern of running event loops across threads, common in production applications.
Stack Overflow: how to properly create and run concurrent tasks with asyncio — canonical Q&A on asyncio.Task creation and event loop scheduling of concurrent coroutines.
Python asyncio event loop internals — focuses specifically on the internal scheduling mechanism, I/O polling, and callback dispatch within the event loop.
